div.head: The Minister in Nicaragua (Hanna) to the Secretary of State
div.p: Supplementing my [April] 4th, 8 p.m. Major R. J. Mitchell commanding aircraft forces of the Marine Brigade here commends highly the cooperation given by planes of the Pan American Airways in the evacuation of wives and families of American officers from Managua and urges that appropriate acknowledgment of this cooperation be made to Mr. Trippe. Major Mitchell specially mentions the splendid work of Messrs. E. Balluder, D. D. Richardson, H. B. Lewis, W. L. Morrison, H. Rammer, R. E. Frizell, Archie Paschal, and J. Dymond.
